test.name: Validate cases for enabled and disabled flags
Theia e-rupi Voucher on UPI Consumption
UPI PSP CONSULT PCF FEE VALIDATION
Verify TPV and NON-TPV Transactions for QrImageRequired Param
Verify deeplink standardization is working fine
Verify payerVpa and payerName is returened in MS response when pref UPI_PAYER_VPA and UPI_PAYER_NAME are ON
Verify mcc and upiVerified fields are present and valid in fetchMerchantUserInfo API response
ReqAuth Flow in ptc for UPI Intent
Order Timeout Not getting captured correctly in Online Intent
UPI PSP Consult Confee less than base amount Validation
PG-1911 -Create identification for DQR transactions for UPI Payments
IFSC and Payer Account Should Come In FluxnetPG2PaymentRequest
